title: Stonestreet Green Solar Project: decision on an application for development consent under the Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by EPL 001 Limited for the construction, operation (including maintenance), and decommissioning of ground-mounted solar photovoltaic arrays with a total capacity of 99.9 megawatts (MW).  Date of decision  23 October 2025  Company / location   EPL 001 LimitedAldington, Kent   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  99.9 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
